prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1G-GTEU (7M-GTEU for extreme builds) with forged internals: JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (9.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264°/264° camshaft set with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise timing. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from HKS for optimized airflow.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo (Japan-spec) with a 4-2-1 header design, 200-cell catalytic converter, and a GReddy Revolution RS 70mm titanium muffler for backpressure optimization. Include a Tomei Type-S 70mm downpipe and a custom wastegate dump tube for precise boost control (targeting 1.2 bar on 98 RON fuel).

Chassis reinforcement with a Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage (A60-specific design) and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K) for subframe and suspension mounts. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for A60 geometry), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and a Cusco 2-way LSD (250Nm torque capacity) for improved power delivery.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (A60-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Pair with Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +15 wheels (ET15) wrapped in Toyo R888R 225/50R15 tires for aggressive stance and grip.

Full custom interior by Bride: Zeta IV reclinable bucket seats (A60-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel with a Cusco quick-release hub, and a full Alcantara headliner/door card retrim by Status Auto. Include a custom gauge pod with Defi Advance BF gauges (oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted in the A-pillar.

Exterior lighting upgrade with Hella H4 100W halogen bulbs (high beam) and custom Cibie Oscar fog lights (JDM-spec) integrated into the front bumper. Paint scheme: Nissan Bayside Blue (KH3) with a 3-stage pearl coat and custom gold leaf pinstriping by a Japanese master (e.g., Kazuki from Osaka).
